description_long: This is a classic, upright parking meter with a rounded top and a robust, cylindrical base, finished in a glossy green color. The front features a transparent window at the top, likely for displaying time remaining, and a metallic coin slot and handle mechanism below it. There is a rectangular metallic plate and a smaller, possibly brass, information or instruction panel on the lower front. The sides are relatively flat and featureless, except for a protruding white handle or knob on one side. The back is mostly plain, with a small access panel and a dark square, possibly for maintenance or identification. The entire structure is made primarily of metal, with some plastic or glass components for the display and interface.
description: A green, upright parking meter with a rounded top, coin slot, and transparent display window, mounted on a sturdy cylindrical base. The front features metallic interface elements and a small information panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent display window, coin slot, handle, and metallic information panels.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the meter's slim profile and a protruding white handle or knob.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain surface with a small access panel and a dark square, lacking interface elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with no visible handles or interface components.
attribute_payment_interface: Coin payment interface is present on the front, with a metallic coin slot and a handle below a transparent display window. No card, contactless, or mobile app interface is visible.
attribute_coin_slot: A coin slot is present on the front, rectangular in shape, located below the display window and above the handle, with metallic finish.
attribute_mounting_post: A cylindrical metal mounting post is visible at the base, connecting the main body to the ground, made of the same green-painted metal as the meter.
